title: clutia rubricaulis
intro: Clutia rubricaulis, also known as Red-stemmed Clutia, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Clutia rubricaulis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, Clutia rubricaulis is typically made into a decoction or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water to extract its medicinal compounds.
